briefdescription.para: A remote party is calling (incoming call).
The process to call the remote party has started on the server, but the remote party is not being alerted (outgoing call).
A remote party is being alerted (outgoing call).
The call is in an active conversation.
The call is connected but held locally.

detaileddescription.para: Locally Held implies that either the server or the client can affect the state.

briefdescription.para: The call is connected but held remotely.

detaileddescription.para: Remotely Held means that the state is controlled by the remote party of a call.

briefdescription.para: The call is connected but held both locally and remotely.
The URI value used to originate a call was formed improperly.
The call failed.
The remote party ended the call.
The call ended from the server.
The line was busy.
Network congestion.
The client terminated the call.
No service.
No answer.
Unspecified.
The opcode write was successful.
An invalid opcode was used for the Call Control Point write.
The requested operation cannot be completed.
The Call Index used for the Call Control Point write is invalid.
The opcode written to the Call Control Point was received when the current Call State for the Call Index was not in the expected state.
Lack of internal resources to complete the requested action.
The Outgoing URI is incorrect or invalid when an Originate opcode is sent.

description.para: Optional features that can be supported.
See bt_tbs_client_read_optional_opcodes() on how to read these from a remote device

briefdescription.para: Local Hold and Local Retrieve Call Control Point Opcodes supported.
Join Call Control Point Opcode supported.
All Control Point Opcodes supported.
No service.
Maximum signal strength.
Signal strength is unknown
3G
4G
Long-term evolution (LTE)
Wifi.
5G
Global System for Mobile Communications (GSM)
Code-Division Multiple Access (CDMA)
2G
Wideband Code-Division Multiple Access (WCDMA)
Inband ringtone enabled.
Server is in silent mod.
If set, call is outgoing else incoming.
If set call is withheld, else not withheld.
If set call is withheld by network, else provided by network.

memberdef.definition: typedef bool(* bt_tbs_originate_call_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, uint8_t call_index, const char *uri)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_originate_call_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for client originating a call.

parameterdescription.para: The connection used.
The call index.
The URI. The value may change, so should be copied if persistence is wanted.

simplesect.para: true if the call request was accepted and remote party is alerted.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_tbs_terminate_call_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, uint8_t call_index, uint8_t reason)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_terminate_call_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for client terminating a call.

detaileddescription.para: The call may be either terminated by the client or the server.

parameterdescription.para: The connection used.
The call index.
The termination BT_TBS_REASON_* reason.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_tbs_join_calls_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, uint8_t call_index_count, const uint8_t *call_indexes)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_join_calls_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for client joining calls.

parameterdescription.para: The connection used.
The number of call indexes to join.
The call indexes.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_tbs_call_change_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, uint8_t call_index)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_call_change_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for client request call state change.

parameterdescription.para: The connection used.
The call index.

briefdescription.para: Callback function for authorizing a client.

parameterdescription.para: The connection used.

simplesect.para: true if authorized, false otherwise

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_tbs_client_discover_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t tbs_count, bool gtbs_found)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t tbs_count, bool gtbs_found)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_client_discover_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for ccp_discover.

parameterdescription.para: The connection that was used to discover CCP for a device.
Error value. BT_TBS_CLIENT_RESULT_CODE_*, GATT error or errno value.
Number of TBS instances on peer device.
Whether or not the server has a Generic TBS instance.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_tbs_client_write_value_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_client_write_value_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for writing values to peer device.

parameterdescription.para: The connection used in the function.
Error value. BT_TBS_CLIENT_RESULT_CODE_*, GATT error or errno value.
The index of the TBS instance that was updated.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_tbs_client_cp_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index, uint8_t call_index)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index, uint8_t call_index)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_client_cp_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for the CCP call control functions.

parameterdescription.para: The connection used in the function.
Error value. BT_TBS_CLIENT_RESULT_CODE_*, GATT error or errno value.
The index of the TBS instance that was updated.
The call index. For bt_tbs_client_originate_call this will always be 0, and does not reflect the actual call index.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_tbs_client_read_string_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index, const char *value)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index, const char *value)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_client_read_string_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for functions that read a string value.

parameterdescription.para: The connection used in the function.
Error value. BT_TBS_CLIENT_RESULT_CODE_*, GATT error or errno value.
The index of the TBS instance that was updated.
The Null-terminated string value. The value is not kept by the client, so must be copied to be saved.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_tbs_client_read_value_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index, uint32_t value)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index, uint32_t value)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_client_read_value_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for functions that read an integer value.

parameterdescription.para: The connection used in the function.
Error value. BT_TBS_CLIENT_RESULT_CODE_*, GATT error or errno value.
The index of the TBS instance that was updated.
The integer value.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_tbs_client_termination_reason_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index, uint8_t call_index, uint8_t reason)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index, uint8_t call_index, uint8_t reason)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_client_termination_reason_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for ccp_read_termination_reason.

parameterdescription.para: The connection used in the function.
Error value. BT_TBS_CLIENT_RESULT_CODE_*, GATT error or errno value.
The index of the TBS instance that was updated.
The call index.
The termination reason.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_tbs_client_current_calls_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index, uint8_t call_count, const struct bt_tbs_client_call *calls)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index, uint8_t call_count, const struct bt_tbs_client_call *calls)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_client_current_calls_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for ccp_read_current_calls.

parameterdescription.para: The connection used in the function.
Error value. BT_TBS_CLIENT_RESULT_CODE_*, GATT error or errno value.
The index of the TBS instance that was updated.
Number of calls read.
Array of calls. The array is not kept by the client, so must be copied to be saved.

memberdef.definition: typedef void(* bt_tbs_client_call_states_cb) (struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index, uint8_t call_count, const struct bt_tbs_client_call_state *call_states)
memberdef.argsstring: )(struct bt_conn *conn, int err, uint8_t inst_index, uint8_t call_count, const struct bt_tbs_client_call_state *call_states)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_client_call_states_cb

briefdescription.para: Callback function for ccp_read_call_state.

parameterdescription.para: The connection used in the function.
Error value. BT_TBS_CLIENT_RESULT_CODE_*, GATT error or errno value.
The index of the TBS instance that was updated.
Number of call states read.
Array of call states. The array is not kept by the client, so must be copied to be saved.

briefdescription.para: Accept an alerting call.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the call that will be accepted.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Hold a call.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the call that will be held.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve a call.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the call that will be retrieved.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Terminate a call.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the call that will be terminated.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Originate a call.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the Telephone Bearer.
The remote URI.
Pointer to a value where the new call_index will be stored.

simplesect.para: int A call index on success (positive value), errno value on fail.

briefdescription.para: Join calls.

parameterdescription.para: The number of call indexes to join
Array of call indexes to join.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Notify the server that the remote party answered the call.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the call that was answered.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Notify the server that the remote party held the call.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the call that was held.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Notify the server that the remote party retrieved the call.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the call that was retrieved.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Notify the server that the remote party terminated the call.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the call that was terminated.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

memberdef.argsstring: (uint8_t bearer_index, const char *to, const char *from, const char *friendly_name)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_remote_incoming

briefdescription.para: Notify the server of an incoming call.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the Telephone Bearer.
The URI that is receiving the call.
The URI of the remote caller.
The friendly name of the remote caller.

simplesect.para: int New call index if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Set a new bearer provider.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the Telephone Bearer or BT_TBS_GTBS_INDEX for GTBS.
The new bearer provider name.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Set a new bearer technology.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the Telephone Bearer or BT_TBS_GTBS_INDEX for GTBS.
The new bearer technology.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Update the signal strength reported by the server.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the Telephone Bearer or BT_TBS_GTBS_INDEX for GTBS.
The new signal strength.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Sets the feature and status value.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the Telephone Bearer or BT_TBS_GTBS_INDEX for GTBS.
The new feature and status value.

simplesect.para: int BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Sets the URI scheme list of a bearer.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the Telephone Bearer.
Comma-separated list of URI prefixes (e.g. "skype,tel").

simplesect.para: BT_TBS_RESULT_CODE_* if positive or 0, errno value if negative.

briefdescription.para: Register the callbacks for TBS.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the callback structure.

briefdescription.para: Register a Telephone Bearer.

detaileddescription.para: This will register a Telephone Bearer Service (TBS) (or a Generic Telephone Bearer service (GTBS)) with the provided parameters.

As per the TBS specification, the GTBS shall be instantiated for the feature, and as such a GTBS shall always be registered before any TBS can be registered. Similarly, all TBS shall be unregistered before the GTBS can be unregistered with bt_tbs_unregister_bearer().

parameterdescription.para: The parameters to initialize the bearer.
The bearer index if return value is >= 0
param contains invalid data
param.gtbs is true and GTBS has already been registered
param.gtbs is false and GTBS has not been registered
param.gtbs is false and no more TBS can be registered (see CONFIG_BT_TBS_BEARER_COUNT)
The service failed to be registered

briefdescription.para: Unregister a Telephone Bearer.

detaileddescription.para: This will unregister a Telephone Bearer Service (TBS) (or a Generic Telephone Bearer service (GTBS)) with the provided parameters. The bearer shall be registered first by bt_tbs_register_bearer() before it can be unregistered.
Similarly, all TBS shall be unregistered before the GTBS can be unregistered with.

parameterdescription.para: The index of the bearer to unregister.
Success
bearer_index is invalid
The bearer identified by bearer_index is not registered
The bearer identified by bearer_index is GTBS and there are TBS instances registered.
The service failed to be unregistered

briefdescription.para: Prints all calls of all services to the debug log.
Discover TBS for a connection.

detaileddescription.para: This will start a GATT discover and setup handles and subscriptions.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to discover TBS for.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, GATT error value on fail.

briefdescription.para: Set the outgoing URI for a TBS instance on the peer device.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.
The Null-terminated URI string.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.

briefdescription.para: Set the signal strength reporting interval for a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.
The interval to write (0-255 seconds).

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_SET_BEARER_SIGNAL_INTERVAL must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Request to originate a call.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.
The URI of the callee.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_ORIGINATE_CALL must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Request to terminate a call.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.
The call index to terminate.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_TERMINATE_CALL must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Request to hold a call.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.
The call index to place on hold.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_HOLD_CALL must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Accept an incoming call.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.
The call index to accept.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_ACCEPT_CALL must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Retrieve call from (local) hold.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.
The call index to retrieve.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_RETRIEVE_CALL must be set for this function to be effective.

memberdef.argsstring: (struct bt_conn *conn, uint8_t inst_index, const uint8_t *call_indexes, uint8_t count)
memberdef.name: bt_tbs_client_join_calls

briefdescription.para: Join multiple calls.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.
Array of call indexes.
Number of call indexes in the call_indexes array.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_JOIN_CALLS must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the bearer provider name of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_BEARER_PROVIDER_NAME must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the UCI of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_BEARER_UCI must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the technology of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_BEARER_TECHNOLOGY must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the URI schemes list of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_BEARER_URI_SCHEMES_SUPPORTED_LIST must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the current signal strength of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_BEARER_SIGNAL_STRENGTH must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the signal strength reporting interval of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_READ_BEARER_SIGNAL_INTERVAL must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the list of current calls of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_BEARER_LIST_CURRENT_CALLS must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the content ID of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_CCID must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the call target URI of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_INCOMING_URI must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the feature and status value of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_STATUS_FLAGS must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the states of the current calls of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.

briefdescription.para: Read the remote URI of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_INCOMING_CALL must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the friendly name of a call for a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_CALL_FRIENDLY_NAME must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Read the supported opcode of a TBS instance.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index of the TBS instance.

simplesect.para: int 0 on success, errno value on fail.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_OPTIONAL_OPCODES must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Register the callbacks for CCP.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the callback structure.
Success
cbs is NULL
cbs is already registered

briefdescription.para: Look up Telephone Bearer Service instance by CCID.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The CCID to lookup a service instance for.

simplesect.para: Pointer to a Telephone Bearer Service instance if found else NULL.
CONFIG_BT_TBS_CLIENT_CCID must be set for this function to be effective.

briefdescription.para: Look up Telephone Bearer Service instance by index.

parameterdescription.para: The connection to the TBS server.
The index to lookup a service instance for.

simplesect.para: Pointer to a Telephone Bearer Service instance if found else NULL.

briefdescription.para: A characteristic value has changed while a Read Long Value Characteristic sub-procedure is in progress.

The GTBS index denotes whenever a callback is from a Generic Telephone Bearer Service (GTBS) instance, or whenever the client should perform on action on the GTBS instance of the server, rather than any of the specific Telephone Bearer Service instances.
Maximum size of bearer uniform caller identifier (UCI)

detaileddescription.para: Includes the NULL terminator. Allowed values are defined by Bluetooth Assigned Numbers.

briefdescription.para: Telephone Bearer Service (TBS)

detaileddescription.para:
3.0
0.8.0
The Telephone Bearer Service (TBS) provide procedures to discover telephone bearers and control calls.
